Name: Hazy Barbecue
Description: A family owned barbecue restaurant with great patio seating. They have a large menu of options to choose from when ordering. Located in the heart of downtown Danville. https://www.hazybarbecue.com/about/"

Name: San Ramon Valley High School
Description: A four year public high school located in downtown Danville. Their mascot is a wolf. I went to school here for four years.https://srvhs.srvusd.net/Athletics/SRVHS-Athletics/index.html"

Name: Yogurt Shack
Description: A small frozen yogurt shop located in the heart of downtown, next to Hazy Barbecue. Known for their classic flavors and low prices, it is a local staple! https://www.yelp.com/biz/yogurt-shack-danville"

Name: Primos Pizzeria
Description: A local must see is Primos. It is a pizza restaurant popular to watch local sporting events at. Primos has a large selection of outdoor seating and almost always has a crowd! https://www.yelp.com/biz/primos-pizzeria-and-pub-danville-3"

Name: Hap Magee Park
Description: Hap Magee Park is a great place for people of all ages. It offers play structures, swings, and water activities. There are also volleyball nets and a dog park. https://www.danville.ca.gov/facilities/facility/details/Hap-Magee-Ranch-Park-3"

Name: Saint Isidore School
Description: Saint Isidore School is a Catholic school for kindergarten to eighth grade. This was where I went to school for Kindergarten through eighth grade. There is a Catholic church on campus! https://www.stisidore.org"

Name: Revel Kitchen & Bar
Description: Revel is a higher end restaurant located in the center of downtown. They have great truffle fries, and are known for their higher end dishes. It is a great place for a special occasion! https://www.revelkitchenandbar.com"

Name: Museum of San Ramon Valley"
Description: A fun spot to take visitors in Danville is the Museum of San Ramon Valley. It is a great and fun way to learn about the histroy of the town.https://museumsrv.org"

Name: Valley Medlyn's
Description: Valley Medlyn's is one of the best breakfast spots in town. It is a great place to take Danville visitors for a hearty breakfast. Their pancakes are amazing! https://www.facebook.com/VallyMedlyns/"

Name: Primos Pizzeria
Description: A local must see is Primos. It is a pizza restaurant popular to watch local sporting events at. Primos has a large selection of outdoor seating and almost always has a crowd! https://www.yelp.com/biz/primos-pizzeria-and-pub-danville-3"
